items.summary: Fix the OAuthCallback page so it does not show 'Connection Failed / Actor not available' when the actor is not yet initialized. The page should wait for the actor to become available (with a loading state) before attempting to exchange the OAuth authorization code, rather than failing immediately if the actor is null or undefined.

Ensure the actor initialization in useActor hook and the OAuthCallback page are properly synchronized — the OAuthCallback should re-attempt or wait using React Query's enabled flag or a polling/retry strategy until the authenticated actor is ready before proceeding with the OAuth callback processing.
